next_steps_required: delivery_to_final_directory (attempt physical removal of plugin/run.sh vestige)
run_report (note Windows pivot + harness sandbox caveat)
summary: v3 Windows-pivot rebuild complete. S2/S3/S4 unaffected. S1 manifest amended (OS->windows, +Nodejs.Version='20', +CodePathWin='plugin/main.js', -CodePathMac, Description updated). S5 scrapped and replaced (music-source-applescript -> music-source-smtc; AppleScript+osascript -> PowerShell+WinRT SMTC via execFile('powershell.exe', [...]), C-S4-S5 surface and dev-002 MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE shim preserved verbatim). S6 harness amended (spawn 'sh run.sh' -> 'node plugin/main.js' matching Windows host CodePathWin+Nodejs.Version execution; AA.S5.4 literals shifted to SMTC list; added explicit MCA.TDIPA.4 / MCA.TDIPD.1 / MCA.TDIPD.2 records and AA.S1.6 + AA.S1.2.no-mac). run.sh reduced to inert vestige (could not physically delete in cowork sandbox; dev-005). Harness ran 33/33 assertions passed including PNV.1.
harness_sandbox_caveat: powershell.exe is not present in the linux harness sandbox. MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var (dev-002, preserved verbatim) bypasses the real powershell.exe spawn so the harness verifies plugin response-logic + SDK message protocol against fixture data. The powershell.exe-to-SMTC boundary itself is structurally asserted by AA.S5.4 / MCA.TDIPD.2 literal-presence checks on music_source.js. Real-Windows-host end-to-end verification is delegated to the user's installation test on Windows 10/11 with Apple Music for Windows playing.
vestiges: plugin/run.sh: reduced to inert comment-only content; not referenced by manifest. Could not be physically deleted in cowork sandbox (dev-005); flagged for removal in final-delivery step.
